agy.notes: Default agy. No --model flag, uses agy's own default. One-shot print mode. Full prompt via flag.

agy-flash.notes: Default for 'agy flash' / 'agy 3.5 flash'. Medium = balanced price/perf. Claude quota NOT used.

agy-flash-low.notes: Cheapest 3.5 Flash tier. Use for trivial prompts.

agy-pro.notes: Default for 'agy pro' / 'agy 3.1 pro'. Slower than Flash, stronger reasoning. Claude quota NOT used.

agy-pro-low.notes: 3.1 Pro on lower reasoning effort. Cheaper than agy-pro.

agy-claude.notes: Default for 'agy claude'. Counts against the Claude quota, not the Gemini one.

agy-opus.notes: Claude Opus. Counts against the Claude quota. Most expensive option.
